name: Silkeborg IF Invest A/S
summary: Silkeborg IF Invest A/S operates a professional football club in Denmark. It also engages in the rental and operation of business area; and hotel and conference activities. The company was formerly known as SIF Football Support A/S and changed its name to Silkeborg IF Invest A/S in 2008. Silkeborg IF Invest A/S was founded in 1917 and is based in Silkeborg, Denmark.
